description_long: This object is a sleek, all-metal throwing knife with a streamlined, symmetrical design. The blade is double-edged and tapers to a sharp point, ideal for piercing. The handle is integrated into the same piece of metal as the blade, featuring three circular cutouts that reduce weight and improve balance. The surface appears smooth and metallic, with a matte to slightly glossy finish, and no visible grip wrapping or additional materials. There are no decorative engravings or ornamentation, giving it a utilitarian, minimalist appearance. The overall form is compact and balanced, suitable for precise throwing or utility use.
description: A streamlined, all-metal throwing knife with a double-edged blade and three circular cutouts in the handle. The design is minimalist and utilitarian, with a smooth metallic finish.
description_view_0: A narrow, edge-on view showing the thin profile and sharpness of the blade.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the full double-edged blade, pointed tip, and handle with three circular cutouts.
description_view_2: Another edge-on view, similar to view 0, emphasizing the slimness and symmetry.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, mirroring view 1, showing the blade and handle cutouts from the other side.
attribute_handle_design: integrated metal handle with three circular cutouts, straight, no grip wrapping
